blockingIssues.description: Five reviewed foundation refactor features bundled unrelated package/manifest version bumps into shared-type changes, widening feature scope and changing release metadata outside the feature requirements. Affected features: shared-consolidate-runtime-messages, shared-consolidate-orchestrator-types, shared-consolidate-profile-types, shared-consolidate-json-rpc, and shared-refactor-orchestrator.

The runtime-message serialization coverage is incomplete: the review found four declared message variants (`assistant_response`, `report_image_captured`, `report_images_selection`, and `session_tabs_update`) missing from the feature's regression coverage, so VAL-TYPES-001 is not fully evidenced.
The reviewed feature commit did not fully complete the promised PlanStatus/CommonTaskStatus alignment because `plan.ts` still carried its own inline status source during that feature range.

The provider/profile refactor only partially extracted the shared base typing and still lacks dedicated unit-test evidence for `createProfile`, `resolveProfile`, and profile/provider compatibility required by VAL-TYPES-004.
The JSON-RPC consolidation lacks dedicated unit-test coverage for `isJsonRpcRequest`, `isJsonRpcNotification`, and `isJsonRpcResponse`, so VAL-TYPES-005 is not adequately substantiated.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/shared-foundation-notes.md` documenting the current shared-package module layout, the runtime-message entrypoint and 22-variant union, the `ToolDefinition` move into `json-rpc.ts`, and the fact that `npm run test:unit` ignores extra CLI filters like `-- --grep` because `tests/unit/run-unit-tests.ts` hard-codes suite registration.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the `npm run test:unit -- --grep '<pattern>'` guidance with repo-accurate instructions that explain the current unit runner ignores CLI grep filters, and require workers to add/register a focused suite when a validation contract depends on specific unit-test evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-consolidate-profile-types and shared-consolidate-json-rpc both relied on grep-style guidance even though `tests/unit/run-unit-tests.ts` hard-codes suites; both reviews also flagged missing contract-specific unit-test evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add `npm run check:repo-standards` to the required final validation sequence and explicitly require workers to record deviations when they skip any listed validator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-consolidate-orchestrator-types and shared-refactor-orchestrator reviews both flagged the missing repo-standards check; shared-consolidate-plan-types also showed a mismatch between the skill's stated validation procedure and the worker's recorded `followedProcedure: true` handoff.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mission-wide guardrail that non-release refactor features must not bundle package or manifest version bumps unless the feature explicitly changes release/versioning metadata.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Unrelated version bumps were reported in five reviewed foundation features: shared-consolidate-runtime-messages, shared-consolidate-orchestrator-types, shared-consolidate-profile-types, shared-consolidate-json-rpc, and shared-refactor-orchestrator.

rejectedObservations.observation: The runtime-message review noted that the handoff commitId pointed to a cleanup commit instead of the substantive implementation commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: single-case process issue; not enough evidence yet to codify as a systemic rule change

rejectedObservations.observation: The runtime-message review also cited stale mission validation-contract wording that still says 21 runtime message variants.
rejectedObservations.reason: mission artifact is outside the validator's low-risk apply-now scope; the actionable repo knowledge was captured in the new library note instead
